<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "6, ['Request to include a compliance summary template for submission to authorities', 'Professional Liability and Cyber Liability insurance coverage details (no liability coverage field in template)', 'Compliance documentation submission deadlines and proof requirements for authorities', 'Add-on for Home Office Protection covering data recovery and photography gear (no such field for professional equipment)', 'Optional Preventive Care Package and Wellness Programs as paid add-ons (not covered by template structure)', 'Request to prepare and submit compliance declaration to authorities']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "13, ['Health insurance plan options with monthly cost, coverage tier, quality rating, deductible, and telemedicine inclusion', 'Mental health insurance component with therapy and psychiatry services', 'Property and contents insurance plan with monthly cost and quality rating', 'Travel insurance plan covering adventure activities, business travel, and medical evacuation', 'Adventure travel add-on coverage', 'Emergency coordination and global assistance features', 'Family coverage options and inclusion', 'Coverage limits and deductible percentages', 'Plan compliance status (available, standard, compliant)', 'Delivery method (digital documents via email) and signature requirement', 'Documentation and confirmation fields such as policy number, confirmation number, and processing status', 'Service features such as 24/7 support, telemedicine, gym reimbursement, and multilingual assistance', 'Deadlines and implementation timelines represented using scheduling_information and policy_timeline fields']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 6, ['Request to include a compliance summary template for submission to authorities', 'Professional Liability and Cyber Liability insurance coverage details (no liability coverage field in template)', 'Compliance documentation submission deadlines and proof requirements for authorities', 'Add-on for Home Office Protection covering data recovery and photography gear (no such field for professional equipment)', 'Optional Preventive Care Package and Wellness Programs as paid add-ons (not covered by template structure)', 'Request to prepare and submit compliance declaration to authorities']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 13, ['Health insurance plan options with monthly cost, coverage tier, quality rating, deductible, and telemedicine inclusion', 'Mental health insurance component with therapy and psychiatry services', 'Property and contents insurance plan with monthly cost and quality rating', 'Travel insurance plan covering adventure activities, business travel, and medical evacuation', 'Adventure travel add-on coverage', 'Emergency coordination and global assistance features', 'Family coverage options and inclusion', 'Coverage limits and deductible percentages', 'Plan compliance status (available, standard, compliant)', 'Delivery method (digital documents via email) and signature requirement', 'Documentation and confirmation fields such as policy number, confirmation number, and processing status', 'Service features such as 24/7 support, telemedicine, gym reimbursement, and multilingual assistance', 'Deadlines and implementation timelines represented using scheduling_information and policy_timeline fields']
